answer:
The Bergen Mall currently has 900,000 square feet. After demolition of 300,000 square feet and construction of 580,000 square feet, the total will be 1,360,000 square feet. Target will build 180,000 square feet, so the percentage is \( \frac{180,000}{1,360,000} \times 100\% \approx 13.235\% \).

\boxed{13.235}
